purpose: Door Rain Plane World-Space: projected portal sheet outside mapped doors with depth/ceiling guard and full-screen threshold override; no fixed V206 Y fallback for mapped doors.
implemented: Added V209 constants and debug flags.
Added world-space rain plane projection from door descriptor endpoints shifted slightly outside threshold.
Generated micro-ranges from projected plane geometry rather than fixed screen-space yTop/yBottom.
Added ZBuffer/wall and CeilingDepthBuffer top-occlusion guard per micro-range.
Added full-screen override when mapped threshold is open/near/wide enough, so doorway/soglia does not remain a small rain band.
Blocked V206 fixed-screen fallback for mapped doors when V209 is active.
Updated in-game visible UI, launcher names, build id, debug checks.
